Leaderboard v4 NEW Compare LLMs How it works About Contribute Audit GitHub ↗

Compare DR frameworks across LLMs

The Elo on the home page is for one backbone (DeepSeek V4-flash). This page will surface the agent × LLM matrix once the other backbones are benchmarked. Same tasks, same scoring, just swap the backbone — and see whether your favourite DR framework still wins.

Leaderboard Compare backbones v4 Audit
Backbones tracked
LLM Provider Status Notes
DeepSeek V4-flash DeepSeek (api.deepseek.com) live 283 run-score files. Thinking off. Routed via ds_proxy:8088.
DeepSeek V4-pro DeepSeek (api.deepseek.com) queued Same proxy, just BACKBONE=deepseek-v4-pro. ~10× more expensive than flash.
GPT-4o-mini OpenAI queued Needs OpenAI API key + a second ds_proxy on port 8090. Commercial baseline.
Claude Sonnet 4.6 Anthropic queued Needs Anthropic API key + an OpenAI-compat shim. Best on agentic tool-use.
Gemini 2.5 Pro Google queued Needs Google AI key. Vertex's OpenAI-compat endpoint avoids needing a custom shim.
Local Qwen3.5-27b LM Studio (5090) queued Free local inference once the host GPU is online. We've tested this path; serves via ds_proxy_lm:8089.

How the comparison works

Same 57 cross-site research tasks, same deterministic scorer, same Bradley-Terry Elo. The only thing that varies is the LLM backbone the agent uses internally. We expect to see two effects:

  • Universal rank stability — agents that fabricate URLs under one LLM tend to fabricate under all LLMs. The reach gate kills them either way.
  • Local rank flips — an agent whose runner uses tool-calling heavily (e.g. ii-researcher) does much better on tool-strong models (Claude / GPT-4o) than on weaker ones.

Once two or more backbones land, this page renders an interactive agent × LLM heatmap of composite_v2 means, plus per-agent "best LLM" annotation.

Want a specific LLM added? Open an issue on GitHub.
DR Deep-Research Arena

Independent leaderboard for open-source deep-research agents. Same tasks, same scoring, public method.

composite_v2 = reachability · qm · nli · (0.4 url + 0.4 judge + 0.2 spec) · Sandbox: Magento + Postmill + Kiwix · Bradley-Terry Elo · bootstrap N=1000
